meta.notes: Java experience is intentionally presented as a secondary/foundational skill. C#/.NET/ASP.NET Core is the primary professional identity for this portfolio. Skill durations (years) reconciled from years-of-experience figures stated across all CV variants (CVJ, CVQ, CACV); where variants conflicted, the more conservative figure was kept.

personal.headline: .NET / Full-Stack Developer
personal.workAuthorization: Polish permanent residence permit — full right to work in Poland and the EU

summary: Computer Engineering Master's student and ambitious Software Developer focused on the Microsoft technology stack. Commercial experience building backend systems in ASP.NET Core and working within Agile/Scrum methodologies using Azure DevOps. Comfortable crossing the stack to build reactive front-end applications with Angular, React, and TypeScript. Strong advocate for software quality, backed by dedicated traineeship experience in unit and integration testing. Seeking a long-term role to grow into a foundational team member, leveraging modern .NET, cloud services, and clean code principles.

projects.name: Infinity Bank (Web Application)
projects.description: Secure banking web application built with ASP.NET Core and Clean Architecture. Business logic structured with the CQRS and generic Repository patterns to keep calculations separated from infrastructure, with a Result-based error handling model, JWT authentication, an email verification flow, and rigorous FluentValidation-based request validation ensuring consistent, auditable transaction records.

projects.name: Full-Stack Restaurant Management System
projects.description: Comprehensive restaurant/food-service operations web application (presented under two working names across CV variants). Reactive, component-based Angular/TypeScript frontend backed by a Spring Boot REST API, JWT authentication, JPA/Hibernate entity mapping, an optimized PostgreSQL schema tuned for high-concurrency order processing, and JUnit/Mockito unit tests validating business logic.

projects.name: Customer Loss Prediction
projects.description: Independent self-learning project applying software engineering rigor to a data problem: built reproducible, testable data pipelines comparing seven machine learning classifiers on a real-world dataset (~17,000 records), with an emphasis on structured, modular code design and automated data validation.

projects.name: MastaFit (BSc Diploma Project)
projects.description: Responsive fitness-tracking frontend built as a Bachelor's diploma project, focused on modern UI/UX principles, component reusability, and seamless client-side state management. Deployed to production via Netlify.

projects.name: Webmarket Frontend
projects.description: Dynamic e-commerce frontend with reusable, componentized UI and hand-tuned UI/UX for an interactive client-side shopping experience.

projects.name: Internet Marketplace App
projects.description: Angular frontend for a marketplace-style web application, built as a personal project to deepen component-based architecture and state management skills outside of coursework.

projects.name: DiscordMangaBot
projects.description: Personal side project: a Discord bot for manga-related lookups and notifications, secondary to the core .NET/full-stack focus but demonstrating range in Python scripting and third-party API integration.
